title: Eva MMORPG
wikitext:
[]: Eva MMORPG             Quote Post by BeserkerUnit-01 » Mon Mar 17, 2008 5:14 pm What would happen if they made an Eva MMORPG? You could make a custom pilot and Eva, maybe make your own Angels (MAYBE) and battle on the Tokyo-3 plains and in the Geo-Front. I'd like that game. Anyone else agree or disagree, state why in here.

[]:             Quote Post by RandomStuff » Mon Mar 17, 2008 5:30 pm I think it would [Gainax wouldn't have an MMO made but...] be setafter 3I, involve none of the original characters, and assumne a good chunk of humanity is back alive and intent on killing each other. And they somehow got Evas, and haven'tfigured cooperation would be better, and you'd really have to suspend your disbelief.

[]:             Quote Post by Shiro » Mon Mar 17, 2008 5:45 pm Any MMO that involved Evas would be too much suspension of disbelief and totally ridiculous. In Episode 02, the committee mentions that the repair costs for Eva-01 and 00 would bankrupt a small country. Thousands of Evas? Come on. Get real. And the Geofront can't hold thousands of Evas, not to mention they can't have made thousands of Adam clones without the whole project getting noticed more. All in all, it wouldn't work. And a post 3I MMO would be boring. Interesting idea, but in execution, there isn't much there.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Mon Mar 17, 2008 5:50 pm Shiro: IT'S JUST A GAME.

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Mon Mar 17, 2008 6:55 pm Shiro wrote: Any MMO that involved Evas would be too much suspension of disbelief and totally ridiculous.

[]:             Quote Post by Furu » Mon Mar 17, 2008 6:58 pm It wouldn't work unless it was purposefully silly using SD EVAs or something. Evangelion is just not a setting that lends itself well to this sort of thing.

[]:             Quote Post by Shiro » Mon Mar 17, 2008 6:59 pm By suspension of disbelief, I mean ignoring the fundamental...laws of physics. Like being able to fit thousands of Evas in the Geofront. I meant suspension of disbelief with regards to the series.

[]:             Quote Post by RandomStuff » Mon Mar 17, 2008 7:10 pm Well the Geofront is destroyed, probably multiple nations with multiple, Big O style hangers or an adaption of the Geofront's. If you don't want to take the cool way. Maybe I should have underlined and bolded "suspend your disbelief"

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Sat Mar 22, 2008 4:43 am It's: NEON GENESIS EVANGELION: SPACE WARS That solves that problem.

[]:             Quote Post by RandomStuff » Sun Mar 23, 2008 9:42 pm That sounds more like Bandai territory, it'd look like Gundam with even bigger robots.

[]:             Quote Post by mrpanda » Sun Mar 23, 2008 9:59 pm Woulnd be good enough for the geeks like us too many holes in the story.

[]:             Quote Post by Enki v.2 » Mon Mar 24, 2008 11:03 am There *is* an eva MMORPG. It's set during instrumentality. ... It's called Second Life :P

[]:             Quote Post by BeserkerUnit-01 » Mon Mar 24, 2008 1:41 pm Guys, serioudly. IT"S A GAME! I don't care if they have you choose a country of origin if it's still on Earth, and if it's in space, well thats overkill. But seriously, use game physics not real life ones. IT DOESN'T MATTER HOW MUCH THEY COST!!! It's not like I'm talking about making real EVA's, god.

[]:             Quote Post by The Bastard King » Mon Mar 24, 2008 4:50 pm I'm of the opinion that it would suck horribly, regardless of whether IT'S A GAME or not.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Mon Mar 24, 2008 7:12 pm Make GNR and GNG a character, and I'd play it.

[]:             Quote Post by RandomStuff » Mon Mar 24, 2008 9:36 pm Sachiel_13 wrote: Make GNR and GNG a character, and I'd play it.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Mon Mar 24, 2008 9:39 pm My evil creation in the IRC. GIANT NAKED GENDO.

[]:             Quote Post by The Bastard King » Mon Mar 24, 2008 9:46 pm Wasn't he in Paradise Lost?

[]:             Quote Post by darkness713 » Tue Mar 25, 2008 1:07 am Hmm, I'd look at it, play it maybe once, and ditch it soon after. My computer sucks. If you're that worried about holes in the plot and such, have it take place in another of those weird alternate realities that Shinji dreams up.

[]:             Quote Post by The Bastard King » Tue Mar 25, 2008 2:58 am Everyone's an orphan! Everyone's mother's soul is trapped in horrific biomechs! Everyone has psychological trauma! Buy the Evangelion MMORPG and join NERV in their fight against only 17 angels! And for a limited time only, hunters will get the option of getting a warm water penguin as a pet! God's in his Heaven, all's right in the World of Warcraft. Can no one see how truly retarded this whole idea seems? How would you even level up? There would only be 20 or so battles total, for Chirst's sakes!
summary:

You could make a custom pilot and Eva, maybe make your own Angels (MAYBE) and battle on the Tokyo-3 plains and in the Geo-Front. I'd like that game. Anyone else agree or disagree, state why in here.

[]:             Quote Post by RandomStuff » Mo
